description: Project-planner agent step schemas. The agent is a 3-step linear chain: goal-extract → issue-survey → plan. The terminal plan step emits proposed_issues[] (deferred_items-compatible) to close the gap between goal_axes and existing_issues.

closure.plan.goal-extract.description: Work step output: extract goal_statement and goal_axes from injected {{project_goals}} README. fail-fast: if {{project_goals}} is absent or empty, set extraction_method='absent', leave goal_axes empty, and emit next; the terminal plan step short-circuits to a 'goal unavailable' final_summary with empty proposed_issues.

action.description: next = goal-extract attempt complete (including absent fast-path), advance to closure.plan.issue-survey. repeat = parse retry needed.

goal_statement.description: Goal text extracted verbatim (or near-verbatim) from the project README. Empty string only when extraction_method='absent' (fast-path for missing {{project_goals}}).

extraction_method.description: How the goal was located. absent = {{project_goals}} missing/empty; the closure step will emit a 'goal unavailable' summary.

goal_axes.description: Coverage dimensions implied by the goal (e.g. 'schema', 'CLI', 'docs', 'tests'). Empty list only when extraction_method='absent'.

axis.description: Short name of the coverage dimension.

description.description: What this axis covers in the context of the project goal.

closure.plan.issue-survey.description: Work step output: enumerate open issues in the project bound to the sentinel. Pure listing; no gap analysis here.

action.description: handoff = listing complete (including empty list); transitions from work to closure (closure.plan.plan). repeat = gh call failure / parse error.

existing_issues.description: Open issues currently in the project. Pass-through inventory for the plan step's gap analysis.

existing_issue_count.description: Length of existing_issues, recorded explicitly so the plan step can sanity-check the listing.

closure.plan.plan.description: Closure step output. Compute gap between goal_axes and existing_issues, emit proposed_issues[] (structurally identical to considerer deferred_items so the orchestrator issue-emitter consumes them without transformation). coverage_axes maps each goal axis to the proposed_issues indices that address it.

action.description: closing = emit proposed issues and finish. repeat = re-examine (used only when completed_iterations < maxIterations and the previous attempt was internally inconsistent).

coverage_axes.description: Mapping each goal axis to the proposed_issues indices that address it. Every goal_axes entry MUST appear here even if issue_indices is empty (= gap unaddressed by this batch).

axis.description: Axis name from goal_axes. Must match one of the upstream goal_axes[].axis values.

issue_indices.description: Zero-based indices into proposed_issues[] that address this axis. Empty array = axis unaddressed by this batch.

proposed_issues.description: Issue candidates closing the gap between goal_axes and existing_issues. Structurally compatible with considerer deferred_items — the orchestrator issue-emitter consumes these via the same outbox path.

title.description: Issue title. Self-contained; no reference to the parent issue number required (the runner links it back via body).

body.description: Issue body in markdown. Should restate the scope concretely so the downstream agent does not need to re-read the parent issue.

labels.description: Labels applied to the new issue. Usually 'kind:impl' or 'kind:consider'. Omit 'order:N' — the triager assigns it.

projects.description: Project bindings for the new issue. Absent = inherit parent's projects (when inheritProjectsForCreateIssue is on). Empty array = explicit opt-out (no inheritance). Non-empty array = use this explicit list, parent ignored.

verdict.description: Always 'done' for the plan step — the planner emits issues and finishes. workflow.json maps project-planner.outputPhase=done.

final_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was planned and why.
